violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Various food items throughout the facility were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Establishment was observed to have areas of cluttered items creating possible harborage conditions within the store. Food and nonfood items are to be stored in a way to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The establishment is lacking a hand-washing sink for use at the 3 Bay Sink area. A hand sink is to be installed for use at the e 3 bay sink for washing hands after cleaning and sanitizing coffee equipment. Sale of coffee is to be discontinued until hand sink is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution used for the coffee equipment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Surfaces next to and behind the 3 bay sink are observed have exposed wood. Wood is to be covered/sealed to be non-absorbent and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
